workflow: Set review_decision to accepted or rejected.
Accepted entries must complete the curation block before fixture build.
Reviewed files can be passed to build_manual_fixture_from_review_candidates.py.

structured_payload_candidate.formula: total energy consumed / total gross floor area
structured_payload_candidate.title: Energy Use Intensity (EUI) Definition
structured_payload_candidate.summary: EUI is total energy consumed by the building in one year divided by total gross floor area.

candidate_entries.evidence_text:
Best Practices for Energy Audits Using
ASHRAE 211 -2018 and RETScreen
Session F3: Energy Auditing
Javier Ojeda, P.Eng, CEM, REP, PMP, MBA
candidate_entries.judge_reason: EUI definition with formula and units is a useful operational parameter for energy audits.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Preliminary Energy Use Analysis Data Requirements
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Preliminary energy use analysis requires utility bills and schedules for at least one calendar year.

candidate_entries.evidence_text:
Planning the Audit
Preliminary Energy
Use Analysis:
•Baseline overview of
building's energy
performance
•Early Stage Benchmarking
•Data Sources: utility bills,
schedules (min. 1 calendar
year)
•Key Metrics:
•EUI
•ECI
•Informs depth & focus of
main audit
candidate_entries.judge_reason: Specifies data requirements for a preliminary energy use analysis, useful application guidance.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Model Calibration Tolerance
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Energy model calibration should be within ±10% of real energy consumption.

candidate_entries.evidence_text:
After the Audit
•Model Calibration
•Is the process that allows us to
compare the energy consumption
calculated by the model, with the
real energy consumption.
•Good practice: it should be in the
range of ±10%
•Schedules are important to know,
and be able to correctly put them
on the model
Let’s go with Live Example!
Some Resources
(particularly this one)
candidate_entries.judge_reason: Provides a calibration tolerance for energy models, a useful performance spec.

curation.title: Draft Performance Spec hvac:controller:performance_spec:model_calibration_tolerance for Controller
